name: PB1 - Automated IP Blocking
description: Playbook 1: Extracts source IP from T-Pot webhook alert and blocks it on FortiGate firewall via SOAR proxy REST API call. Triggered by Logstash HTTP output webhook.

triggers.name: T-Pot Alert Webhook
triggers.description: Receives alerts from T-Pot Logstash HTTP output
triggers.note: IMPORTANT: Copy webhook URL from Shuffle UI and paste into Logstash HTTP output config

actions.name: Extract Source IP
actions.description: Extract src_ip field from incoming webhook payload

parameters.note: Field name may vary — check your Logstash output format. Common alternatives: $exec.body.src_ip, $exec.srcip, $exec.data.src_ip

actions.name: Block IP on FortiGate
actions.description: Send POST request to SOAR proxy /block endpoint. Proxy forwards to FortiGate REST API to create deny address object.

parameters.note: 172.19.0.1 is the Docker bridge gateway IP — this reaches the host SOAR proxy from inside Shuffle worker containers

notes.bottleneck: Docker container spawn + FortiGate API call
notes.fortigate_action: Creates address object in Policy & Objects → Addresses
notes.setup: Replace 172.19.0.1:9090 with your proxy address if different. Keep workflows INACTIVE against live T-Pot data to prevent container spawning crisis.
